title: IIT Calculator (China)
description: China Individual Income Tax: 12-month cumulative-withholding table, 7-tier comprehensive-income brackets, itemized deductions, and year-end-bonus single vs merged comparison
disclaimer: For estimation only — not tax advice. Final tax owed is determined by the tax authority. Uses the 7-tier progressive brackets for comprehensive income (effective 2019) and the single-taxation rule for annual bonus (per Cai Shui [2018] No. 164 and extensions).

field.insuranceHint: Pre-tax deduction for social security & housing fund

bonus.computingHint: Enter monthly salary to compare merged option
bonus.hint: Through 2027 you may continue choosing single-taxation for the annual bonus; merging into comprehensive income applies the 7-tier progressive rate. The optimal choice depends on your overall income.
